title: Recent High Value Orders
description: Retrieve all orders placed within the 30-day period leading up to January 1, 2025, along with the corresponding customer names and order amounts, and return the results sorted in descending order of amount.
solution: SELECT c.name, o.amount FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE o.date >= '2024-12-02' ORDER BY o.amount DESC;
